---
title: "cancel_order"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `cancel_order()`

Cancel Order

## Usage

```r
cancel_order(order_id, kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API", demo = FALSE)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `order_id` | Character. The order ID to cancel. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with the cancelled order details.

## Description

Cancels an existing resting order by order ID.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
cancel_order("order-uuid-here")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other trading: 
`amend_order()`,
`batch_cancel_orders()`,
`batch_create_orders()`,
`cancel_all_orders()`,
`create_order()`,
`decrease_order()`,
`get_order()`
